greeting: The drover smells of wet wool, road dust, and cider. He gives you half a nod without giving up his corner of the room.

entries.text: "Names change on the road. Drover is enough in this room."
"I move stock west when the road is kind and east when it is not. Bright pays better than most, if you can stand his counting."
"Cumberland is a funnel. Road, canal, rail, all of it pours through here and leaves mud on the floor."
"Wills Creek rises fast. I have seen a mule refuse a ford ten minutes before the water spoke plain."
